title: This series of cases supports the view that s 5 will not apply when no act or omission of a foreign state takes place in the UK.

evidence.clean_text: This series of cases supports the view that s 5 will not apply when no act or omission of a foreign state takes place in the UK. But they do not require that all acts or omissions must occur in the UK for s 5 to apply, and they indicate that composite acts may fall within s 5.
